raw_output:
## Stakeholder update  
At 08:20 IST, a delay affected 14 medication reminders, which were sent about 60 minutes late. Normal delivery timing resumed by 08:47 IST. No missed doses have been confirmed, and one user reported taking medication later than usual, though no direct link to the delay has been established. The service is currently operating normally. We continue to review the incident and will provide the next update by 10:00 IST.  

## Internal actions  
- Initiate reconciliation to verify no missed or delayed medication doses beyond the reported reminders.  
- Gather and analyze evidence related to the recent configuration change and its timing to support diagnosis.  
- Enhance monitoring around reminder delivery times to detect similar delays promptly.  
- Review release and configuration change procedures to prevent timing-related issues during daylight-saving adjustments.  
- Notify the clinical safety lead per protocol and prepare clear communication for support teams to address user concerns.
